---
title: "Get ADHD medications from OpenPrescribing Hospital (SCMD)"
format: html
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| echo: false
library(DBI)
library(bigrquery)
library(dplyr)
library(dbplyr)
library(here)
library(tidyverse)
library(opencodecounts)

source(here("functions", "ophr.R"))

# ADHD medication codelist URLs from OpenCodelists
adhd_codelist_urls <- list(
  methylphenidate = "https://www.opencodelists.org/codelist/opensafely/methylphenidate-dmd/40bac3af/",
  lisdexamfetamine = "https://www.opencodelists.org/codelist/opensafely/lisdexamfetamine-dmd/27ab507a/",
  dexamfetamine = "https://www.opencodelists.org/codelist/opensafely/dexamfetamine-dmd/6dd2cf76/",
  atomoxetine = "https://www.opencodelists.org/codelist/opensafely/atomoxetine-dmd/436d83a5/",
  guanfacine = "https://www.opencodelists.org/codelist/opensafely/guanfacine-dmd/2a5e1070/"
)

```

```{r}
#| label: connect-bq
con <- connect_scmd()
```

```{r}
#| label: get-codelists
# Get ADHD medication codelists from OpenCodelists
codelists <- purrr::map(
  adhd_codelist_urls,
  ~ get_codelist(.x)
)
```

```{r}
#| label: get-vmp-codes

# Extract VMP codes from codelists (filter to VMP entries only)
vmp_codes <- codelists |>
  purrr::map(~ as_tibble(.x) |> 
  filter(str_detect(term, "\\(VMP\\)"))) |>
  bind_rows() |>
  pull(code) |>
  as.character()
```

```{r}
#| label: get-hospital-prescribing

df_hospital_prescribing <- get_scmd_prescribing(con, vmp_codes) |>
  collect()

df_trusts <- get_scmd_trusts(con) |>
  collect()
```

```{r}
#| label: process-data

# Join with trust data
df_hospital_prescribing <- df_hospital_prescribing |>
  left_join(
    df_trusts |> select(ods_code, ods_name),
    by = "ods_code"
  ) |>
  mutate(year_month = as.Date(year_month)) |>
  arrange(year_month, vmp_name, ods_code)
```

```{r}
#| label: write-data

write_csv(
  df_hospital_prescribing,
  here("output", "openprescribing", "adhd_hospital_prescribing.csv")
)
```
